name: Spiced Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 cups Martha White All-Purpose Flour, sifted
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan or 12-cup bundt pan.
3. Cream butter and sugar together in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Blend in vanilla and almond extracts.
6. Sift flour, mace, nutmeg, and salt together; add to creamed mixture alternately with milk, beginning and ending with the flour mixture.
7. Mix well after each addition.
8. Pour batter into prepared pan.
9. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes or until a toothpick inserted one inch from the edge comes out clean.
10. Allow cooling in the pan for 10 minutes before turning out onto a wire rack to cool completely.
